title: Laundry and Dry-Cleaning Workers
description: Operate or tend washing or dry-cleaning machines to wash or dry-clean industrial or household articles, such as cloth garments, suede, leather, furs, blankets, draperies, linens, rugs, and carpets. Includes spotters and dyers of these articles.

tasks.text: Load articles into washers or dry-cleaning machines, or direct other workers to perform loading.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start washers, dry cleaners, driers, or extractors, and turn valves or levers to regulate machine processes and the volume of soap, detergent, water, bleach, starch, and other additives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate extractors and driers, or direct their operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove items from washers or dry-cleaning machines, or direct other workers to do so.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sort and count articles removed from dryers, and fold, wrap, or hang them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean machine filters, and lubricate equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine and sort into lots articles to be cleaned, according to color, fabric, dirt content, and cleaning technique required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Receive and mark articles for laundry or dry cleaning with identifying code numbers or names, using hand or machine markers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply bleaching powders to spots and spray them with steam to remove stains from fabrics that do not respond to other cleaning solvents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine spotting procedures and proper solvents, based on fabric and stain types.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Spray steam, water, or air over spots to flush out chemicals, dry material, raise naps, or brighten colors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pre-soak, sterilize, scrub, spot-clean, and dry contaminated or stained articles, using neutralizer solutions and portable machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix bleaching agents with hot water in vats, and soak material until it is bleached.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix and add detergents, dyes, bleaches, starches, and other solutions and chemicals to clean, color, dry, or stiffen articles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sprinkle chemical solvents over stains, and pat areas with brushes or sponges to remove stains.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Match sample colors, applying knowledge of bleaching agent and dye properties, and types, construction, conditions, and colors of articles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect soiled articles to determine sources of stains, to locate color imperfections, and to identify items requiring special treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate machines that comb, dry and polish furs, clean, sterilize and fluff feathers and blankets, or roll and package towels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Iron or press articles, fabrics, and furs, using hand irons or pressing machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hang curtains, drapes, blankets, pants, and other garments on stretch frames to dry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify articles' fabrics and original dyes by sight and touch, or by testing samples with fire or chemical reagents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Immerse articles in bleaching baths to strip colors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Spread soiled articles on work tables, and position stained portions over vacuum heads or on marble slabs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
